summary: Researched P0 and P1 priority cards for recurring credits. Verified credits from official issuer pages and Doctor of Credit / NerdWallet / The Points Guy / Upgraded Points.

recurring_credits.name: Disney Streaming Credit
recurring_credits.description: $7/month ($84/year) for streaming services including Disney+, Hulu, ESPN+. Since Aug 2025 update: no minimum spend required, expanded to cover many streaming services beyond Disney bundle. Enrollment required.
recurring_credits.source: American Express official page, Doctor of Credit

recurring_credits.name: Home Chef Credit
recurring_credits.description: $15/month ($180/year) statement credit for Home Chef meal kit purchases. Enrollment required.
recurring_credits.source: American Express official page, Doctor of Credit

recurring_credits.name: Disney Streaming Credit
recurring_credits.description: $10/month ($120/year) for streaming services including Disney+, Hulu, ESPN+. Since Aug 2025 update: no minimum spend required, expanded to cover many streaming services beyond Disney bundle. Enrollment required.
recurring_credits.source: American Express official page, Doctor of Credit

recurring_credits.name: Lyft Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $10/month ($120/year) in Lyft credits after taking 3 eligible rides. Active through September 30, 2027.
recurring_credits.source: The Points Guy, NerdWallet, Upgraded Points

recurring_credits.name: Grubhub Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $10 per billing cycle ($120/year) in Grubhub credits for eligible food delivery orders.
recurring_credits.source: US Credit Card Guide, AwardWallet, Upgraded Points

recurring_credits.name: Inflight WiFi Credit
recurring_credits.description: $25 annual credit for inflight WiFi on American Airlines flights when paying with the card.

notes: Chase Freedom Flex has no recurring credits - only quarterly rotating 5% categories (require activation) and elevated earnings on travel/dining/drugstores.
Discover it has no recurring credits - only quarterly rotating 5% categories (require activation) and first-year cash back match.
Capital One VentureOne is a flat-rate no-annual-fee card with no statement credits.

Chase Ink Business Preferred has DoorDash DashPass (12 months free, then auto-renews at $9.99/month) and $10/month DoorDash credit, but these require DashPass activation - not included as they're conditional subscriptions rather than clear recurring credits.
Citi Premier (citi-strata-premier.json) already has $100 annual hotel credit populated.
